au.updateNote: Still current at:09 July 2026 Updated:01 July 2026 Latest update:You're required to complete an online health self-declaration form up to 24 hours before arrival in India, for Ebola screening. If you don't complete the form before you arrive, expect delays and additional screening procedures at Indian immigration. You must hold a valid visa or Overseas Citizen of India (OCI) card to enter India. Y
